basic_details.job_title: IIML Senior Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow) has released the official Senior Consultant Notification 2026 at iiml.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the IIM Lucknow Senior Consultant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 60 years of age with a Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized Institute or University can apply online on or before 29 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized Institute/University
qualification.details: Senior Consultant (Civil Engineer) / Senior Consultant (Projects): Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized Institute/University. Minimum 20 years of experience in planning, execution, supervision, maintenance, and project management of civil construction works in Central/State Government, Public Sector Undertakings (PSUs), Government Autonomous Bodies or large Private organizations. The candidate should have worked at the equivalent level of Executive Engineer/Superintending Engineer, or an equivalent cadre in Pay Level 11/12 or above at the time of retirement.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIML Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIML to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.indian_institute_of_management_lucknow_i: Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized Institute/University

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIML Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIML Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Senior Consultant (Civil Engineer) / Senior Consultant (Projects): Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized Institute/University. Minimum 20 years of experience in planning, execution, supervision, maintenance, and project management of civil construction works in Central/State Government, Public Sector Undertakings (PSUs), Government Autonomous Bodies or large Private organizations. The candidate should have worked at the equivalent level of Executive Engineer/Superintending Engineer, or an equivalent cadre in Pay Level 11/12 or above at the time of retirement.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIML Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIML to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIML Senior Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the IIML Senior Consultant posts is 29th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Consultant posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized Institute or University to be eligible for these positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the experience required for the Senior Consultant role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 20 years of experience in planning, execution, supervision, maintenance, and project management of civil construction works is required. This experience should be from government or large private organizations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Senior Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Senior Consultant posts is 60 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Consultant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Senior Consultant positions at the Indian Institute of Management Lucknow.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Senior Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,80,000/- per month, which is all-inclusive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for the IIML Senior Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIML Senior Consultant recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the IIML Senior Consultant posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IIML Senior Consultant recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Senior Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Consultant posts at IIML will be based on an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for IIML Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, where a direct link to the PDF is provided. It is recommended to read it thoroughly.
